calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner, Lucreta Costello James, is present.
Attorney, Marco F.M. Acosta, is present representing the petitioner.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name. Lucreta Costello James is sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: LUCRETIA COSTELLO JAMES ELLIS. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Reset To Dec-18-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-30-2007 Reset To Dec-04-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Marco Acosta, Esq. for Petitioner: Lucreta Costello James, NOT present.
At counsel's request, matter is continued to Dec. 4, 2007 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for appearance of the Petitioner.
The Court waived re-publication requirement.
